description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a new account and subscribe to the cheapest available plan that includes at least HD streaming.
tasks.name: Create a new account and subscribe to the cheapest available plan that includes at least HD streaming.
tasks.description: Create a new account and subscribe to the cheapest available plan that includes at least HD streaming.

tasks.instruction: Find a family movie with a rating of at least 4.0 and a runtime under 2 hours, add the highest-rated one to your watchlist, and then open your watchlist page.
tasks.name: Find a family movie with a rating of at least 4.0 and a runtime under 2 hours, add the highest-rated one to your watchlist, and then open your watchlist page.

tasks.instruction: Create a new kids profile named Liam for ages 7–10 and set a 4-digit PIN that is required to switch to any non-kids profile.
tasks.name: Create a new kids profile named Liam for ages 7–10 and set a 4-digit PIN that is required to switch to any non-kids profile.

tasks.instruction: Among series released in 2021 or later in the science fiction genre, start playing the first episode of the highest-rated one and add its second and third episodes from the same season to your up-next queue.
tasks.name: Among series released in 2021 or later in the science fiction genre, start playing the first episode of the highest-rated one and add its second and third episodes from the same season to your up-next queue.

tasks.instruction: Create a custom list named Weekend Binge and add three different series from three different genres, each with a rating of at least 3.5 and at least one season.
tasks.name: Create a custom list named Weekend Binge and add three different series from three different genres, each with a rating of at least 3.5 and at least one season.

tasks.instruction: Play a travel-genre movie, change subtitles to Spanish and audio to the original language, and save these as your default playback settings for future videos.
tasks.name: Play a travel-genre movie, change subtitles to Spanish and audio to the original language, and save these as your default playback settings for future videos.

tasks.instruction: From your account, switch your subscription to the cheapest plan that supports 4 simultaneous streams and costs under $20 per month.
tasks.name: From your account, switch your subscription to the cheapest plan that supports 4 simultaneous streams and costs under $20 per month.
tasks.description: From your account, switch your subscription to the cheapest plan that supports 4 simultaneous streams and costs under $20 per month.

tasks.instruction: Search for crime series, filter to episodes rated at least 4.0 with runtimes under 50 minutes, and set reminders for one qualifying episode from three different series on Friday, Saturday, and Sunday.
tasks.name: Search for crime series, filter to episodes rated at least 4.0 with runtimes under 50 minutes, and set reminders for one qualifying episode from three different series on Friday, Saturday, and Sunday.

tasks.instruction: In your viewing history, rate the first five titles with 4 or 5 stars, then from the "Recommended for You" row on the homepage add the first two recommended movies to your watchlist.
